entries.title: Post-Kamino Dorm Life Is A Security Response

context.label: Class 1-A lives under the new U.A. dorm system

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: After Kamino, Class 1-A lives in U.A. dorms as part of a school security escalation and trust-repair effort.
content.injection: During this period, keep Class 1-A under the new dorm system: closer to each other, more supervised by U.A., and less free to move like ordinary commuters.

entries.title: Shoot Style Redirects Izuku Away From Arm Destruction

context.label: Special moves training begins for license preparation

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.

content.fact: Izuku begins building Shoot Style to reduce arm-damaging punches and route One For All through kicks and mobility.
content.injection: Use Shoot Style as Izuku’s practical adaptation to One For All injuries: legs, movement, and controlled bursts rather than reckless arm-smashing.

ability.name: One For All
constraints: Incomplete control; no later vestige Quirks.
antiLore: Do not use Blackwhip, Float, Fa Jin, Gearshift, or other later abilities here.

entries.title: License Exam Legally Matters More Than Passing A Test

context.label: Class 1-A arrives at the Provisional Hero License Exam

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: A provisional license gives students limited legal authority to perform hero activity in public emergencies; without it, public combat or rescue action can violate hero law.
content.injection: Treat provisional licensing as legal permission with stakes. Passing changes what students can do in public; failing limits their lawful hero activity.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: The Exam Tests Public Hero Conduct Not Only Combat

context.label: Class 1-A arrives at the Provisional Hero License Exam

content.fact: The license exam tests combat, rescue priorities, communication, and public-facing hero conduct rather than raw Quirk strength alone.
content.injection: Evaluate students by rescue judgment, coordination, speech, and lawful hero conduct, not just who wins a fight.

entries.title: Camie In This Exam Is Toga In Disguise

context.label: Izuku is isolated by Camie impersonation

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.

content.fact: The Camie who interacts with Izuku during the license exam is Himiko Toga in disguise, not the real Camie Utsushimi.
content.injection: Hide the Camie impersonation unless the scene is from Toga’s informed perspective or after the reveal. Her behavior should feel flirtatious, invasive, and strategically odd.
